flowAnalysisRuleTypes.description: Produces rule violations for each component (i.e. processors or controller services) of a given type.
Produces rule violations for each component (i.e. processors or controller services) having a property identifying an SSLContextService that is not set.

This rule will generate a violation if backpressure settings of a connection exceed configured thresholds. Improper configuration of backpressure settings can lead to decreased performance because of excessive swapping and can fill up the content repository with too much in-flight data.

This rule will generate a violation if FlowFile expiration settings of a connection exceed configured thresholds. Improper configuration of FlowFile expiration settings can cause files to be deleted unexpectedly and can cause the content repository to fill up.
